# EZ Mart E-Commerce Platform

EZ Mart is a high-performance, modern e-commerce platform built with Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, and Supabase.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js (App Router), React, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Next.js API Routes (/api/*)
- Database: Supabase

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://ezmart.in/) - Featured products, categories catalog, best sellers.
- [Products](https://ezmart.in/products) - Full categories list and scroll-based loaded catalogues.
- [Cart](https://ezmart.in/cart) - Shopping bag items management.
- [Wishlist](https://ezmart.in/wishlist) - Saved user favorites.
- [Profile](https://ezmart.in/profile) - Personal attributes and settings.
- [About Us](https://ezmart.in/about) - Platform details.
- [Order History](https://ezmart.in/myorders) - Track ordered items.
- [Settings](https://ezmart.in/settings) - Settings page.
- [Sign Up](https://ezmart.in/sign-up) - Account registration.
- [Login](https://ezmart.in/login) - User login authentication.

## Developer & Agent Guideline
- Base URL: [https://ezmart.in](https://ezmart.in)
- Sitemaps index: [https://ezmart.in/sitemap.xml](https://ezmart.in/sitemap.xml)
- API routes are located under `/api/`
